markdownRemark.html:
Awesome jQuery

A curated list of awesome jQuery plugins, resources and other shiny things. Inspired by the awesome-* trend on GitHub.

jQuery is a fast, small, and feature-rich JavaScript library. It makes things like HTML document traversal and manipulation, event handling, animation, and Ajax much simpler with an easy-to-use API that works across a multitude of browsers. With a combination of versatility and extensibility, jQuery has changed the way that millions of people write JavaScript.

Resources

Awesome learning material to get to know jQuery and JavaScript or learn something more advanced. Some friendly advice: Before diving deep into jQuery learn JavaScript well.

  • API documentation - Official jQuery documentation.
  • Code School - Learn the basics of jQuery, a JavaScript library, to modify elements on a webpage and improve user interaction.
  • Codecademy jQuery track - Beginners track for learning jQuery.
  • Learning jQuery - Tips, techniques, and tutorials for the jQuery JavaScript library.
  • Style guides - jQuery's code style guides when contributing to jQuery projects.
  • Tuts+ - Useful and indepth articles about jQuery.
  • jQuery guide for teamsstars31 - Tips to write consistent jQuery code, easy to use and understand by your team.

Tutorials

Awesome free tutorials and courses to learn jQuery.

  • jQuery patternsstars1.6k - A variety of jQuery plugin patterns for jump starting your plugin development.
  • Learning jQuery Design Patterns - jQuery Plugin Design Patterns
  • Learn jQuery - jQuery learning center.
  • Snoopcode - jQuery tutorials.
  • Extending jQuery - Extending jQuery’s selector capabilities.
  • Free jQuery Courses at Classpert - List of Free jQuery Courses at Classpert Online Course Search

Back to top

Books

Recommended and not too much outdated jQuery books.

Free Books

  • JavaScript plus a dash of JQuery - A Sensible Introduction to Coding with JavaScript and jQuery, by Nicholas Johnson.
  • jQuery Succinctly, Syncfusion (PDF, mobi, epub) (Registration required).
  • jQuery fundamentalsstars185 - Comfortable working through common problems you'll be called upon to solve using jQuery.

Paid Books

  • jQuery in Action, Third Edition - Fast-paced and complete guide to jQuery, by Bear Bibeault, Yehuda Katz, and Aurelio De Rosa.
  • jQuery: Novice to Ninja: New Kicks And Tricks - fast track to mastering jQuery, by Earle Castledine & Craig Sharkie.
  • Learning jQuery - Fourth Edition - Guide to jQuery, by Jonathan Chaffer and Karl Swedberg.

Back to top

Blogs

Interesting jQuery related blogs and websites.

  • jQuery Blog - News from the official jQuery website.
  • jQuery UI Blog - Official jQuery UI blog.
  • Sitepoint - Sitepoint's jQuery category section with useful articles.
  • Smashing Magazine - jQuery tag, useful jQuery articles and tutorial alike blog posts.

Back to top

Miscellaneous Resources

Various types of resources.

  • jQuery Foundation - Providing jQuery and many other projects home and support.
  • jQuery Source Viewer - Browser of jQuery method implementations.
  • Alternative jQuery Documentation Browser - Faster way to browse the jQuery documentation.
  • TodoMVCstars27.3k - Helps you select JavaScript framework. Same Todo application created in multiple popular JavaScript MV* frameworks including jQuery.
  • jQuery CheatSheet
  • Programming Community Curated Resources for Learning jQuery

Back to top

Plugins

Awesome plugins from all across the jQuery universe.

  • Plugins - Registry of jQuery plugins, previous one is now in read-only mode.
  • jQuery Rain - Top & Best jQuery plugins, tutorials, cool effects, examples, demos.
  • jQuery Unheap - A tidy repository of jQuery plugins.

Back to top

Animation

Animations, transitions.

  • Animsitionstars3.8k - A simple and easy jQuery plugin for CSS animated page transitions.
  • fakeLoader.jsstars710 - Lightweight plugin that helps you create an animated spinner with a fullscreen loading mask to simulate the page preloading effect.
  • Fullpage.jsstars32.1k - Create full screen pages fast and simple.
  • jQuery Transitstars7.4k - Super-smooth CSS3 transformations and transitions for jQuery.
  • Material Design Preloader!sstars381 - Recreation of the Material Design preloader.
  • Midnightstars3.6k - Switches fixed headers on the fly.
  • Parallax.jsstars3.3k - Scrolling effect.
  • Scrollifystars1.7k - Assists scrolling and snaps to sections. Touch optimised.
  • Wavesstars3.4k - Click effect inspired by Google's Material Design.
  • jQuery DrawSVGstars760 - Lightweight, simple to use jQuery plugin to animate SVG paths
  • jQuery Particles - A plugin to easily add Particles animations to your web application

Back to top

Editors

WYSIWYG editors.

  • Froala WYSIWYG HTML Editorstars4.6k - jQuery WYSIWYG Rich Text Editor based on HTML5.
  • Hallostars2.5k - Simple rich text editor (contentEditable) for jQuery UI.
  • jQuery Notebookstars1.7k - A modern, simple and elegant WYSIWYG rich text editor.
  • jQuery TE - Lightweight HTML editor.
  • TinyMCE - Popular WYSIWYG editor with jQuery build and a jQuery integration plugin.

Back to top

Forms

Plugins for Forms, AJAX, validation.

  • Bootstrap Multiselectstars3.4k - Multiselect for Bootstrap.
  • File Uploadstars31k - File Upload widget with multiple file selection, drag&drop support, progress bar, validation and preview images, audio and video.
  • Ideal Formsstars739 - Framework for building and validating responsive HTML5 forms.
  • jQuery Form Pluginstars5.1k - Easy and unobtrusive HTML forms upgrade to use AJAX.
  • jquery-minicolorsstars946 - A tiny color picker plugin.
  • Justified Gallerystars1.5k - Allows you to create a gallery with a justified grid.
  • Labelautystars914 - A lightweight and beautiful plugin for radio and checkbox inputs.
  • Payformstars406 - A library (with jQuery plugin) for building credit card forms, validating inputs, and formatting numbers.
  • Pickadatestars7.7k - The mobile-friendly, responsive, and lightweight date & time input picker.
  • Select2stars24.9k - Select box with support for searching, tagging, remote data sets, infinite scrolling.
  • selectize.jsstars12.6k - jQuery based hybrid of a textbox and <select> box.

Back to top

Images, Maps and Charts

Plugins related to images, image manipulation, galleries, maps and charts.

  • AnyChart-jQuerystars9 - Plugin for easily using AnyChart JavaScript charting library with jQuery.
  • Arborstars2.6k - Graph visualization library using web workers and jQuery.
  • BackStretchstars4k - jQuery plugin that allows you to add a dynamically-resized, slideshow-capable background image to any page or element.
  • Chart.jsstars53.5k - Simple HTML5 Charts using the <canvas> tag.
  • Cropperstars7.8k - A simple image cropping plugin.
  • Dense.jsstars218 - Serving retina-ready, high pixel ratio images with ease.
  • Flotstars5.9k - Attractive charts.
  • Gridderstars450 - Displays a thumbnail grid expanding preview similar to the effect seen on Google Images.
  • jquery.sparklinestars1.2k - Generate small sparkline charts.
  • jQuery.eraserstars318 - Erasing image with mouse or touch movements.
  • jQuery Mapaelstars983 - Plugin based on raphael.js that allows you to display dynamic vector maps.
  • jQueryGanttstars2k - Gantt editor.
  • jQuery Images Comparestars40 - Plugin for comparing two images.
  • Nivo Sliderstars1.2k - Beautiful and easy to use image slider.
  • Owl Carousel 2stars7.4k - Responsive carousel slider.
  • Slickstars26.8k - The last carousel you'll ever need.
  • Peitystars4.2k - Progressive <svg> pie, donut, bar and line charts.
  • Unite Gallerystars526 - Responsive jQuery image and video gallery plugin.
  • Viewerstars985 - A simple jQuery image viewing plugin.
  • JQuery-linechartstars43 - Simple and lightweight library for creating line charts

Back to top

Menus

Menus animation, usability enhancements and beautification.

  • jQuery contextMenustars2.1k - Management facility for context menus.
  • jPanelMenustars937 - Creates a paneled-style menu (like the type seen in the mobile versions of Facebook, Google and native iPhone applications).
  • jQuery-menu-aimstars7.7k - Fires events when user's cursor aims at particular dropdown menu items.
  • mmenustars2.5k - App look-alike on- and off-canvas menus with sliding submenus.
  • Multi-level push menustars811 - Allows endless nesting of navigation elements.
  • Slidebarsstars1.5k - jQuery framework for off-canvas menus and sidebars.
  • stickUpstars1.6k - Sticks an element to the top of the browser window while scrolling past it, always keeping it in view.
  • Superfishstars919 - Adds usability enhancements to existing multi-level drop-down menus.
  • Yammstars1.2k - Yet another megamenu for Bootstrap 3.

Back to top

Modals and Popups

Plugins for modals (dialog box/popups), tooltips, and similar popup windows.

  • animatedModal.jsstars968 - Plugin for creating fullscreen modals with CSS3 transitions. You can use the transitions from animate.css or create your own.
  • Avgrundstars1.8k - Plugin for your modal boxes and popups with new concept of showing depth between popup and page.
  • Bootstrap Modalstars5.1k - Extends the default Bootstrap Modal class. Responsive, stackable and ajax.
  • iziModalstars2.1k - Elegant, responsive, flexible and lightweight modal plugin with jQuery.
  • jBoxstars1.3k - Powerful and flexible plugin which takes care of all modal windows, tooltips and notices.
  • jQuery Modalstars2.4k - Simple and lightweight method of displaying modal windows.
  • jQuery Popup Overlaystars510 - Responsive and accessible modal windows and tooltips.
  • Lightboxstars5.3k - JavaScript library used to overlay images on top of the current page.
  • Magnific Popupstars11.2k - Fast, light and responsive lightbox plugin.
  • SweetAlertstars21.6k - A beautiful replacement for JavaScript's alert.
  • tipsostars320 - A Lightweight Responsive jQuery Tooltip Plugin.
  • vexstars6.9k - A modern dialog library which is highly configurable and easy to style.

Back to top

Tables

Grid plugins and plugins for creating and showcasing data in form of tables.

  • Bootgridstars972 - A grid control especially designed for bootstrap.
  • Bootstrap table - A powerful table control designed for bootstrap.
  • DataTables - Advanced interaction controls for HTML tables.
  • FancyGrid - JavaScript grid library with charts integration and server communication.
  • Filter Tablestars170 - Live searching/filtering for HTML tables.
  • FloatTheadstars1.2k - Sticky headers. Supports responsive, window and overflow scrolling.
  • FooTablestars2.1k - Make HTML tables responsive.
  • Isotopestars10.3k - Filter & sort magical layouts.
  • HighchartTablestars269 - Simple way to convert HTML data tables to Highcharts graphs.
  • jqGridstars2.8k - Grid plugin.
  • jQuery treetablestars730 - Show a tree structure in a table.
  • jsGridstars1.5k - Lightweight grid plugin.
  • Stackable.jsstars1k - Stacking tables on small screens.
  • Stupid Table Sortstars704 - A stupidly small and simple jQuery table sorter plugin.
  • tableExport.jquery.pluginstars811 - Export HTML table to JSON, XML, CSV, TXT, SQL, Word, Excel, PNG or PDF.
  • jquery.table-shrinkerstars29 - make HTML Table responsive across all devices, the right way!

Back to top

Time and Date

Plugins for handling, manipulating or formating time and date.

  • jQuery Timer Pluginstars283 - Start/Stop/Resume/Remove pretty timer inside any HTML element.
  • Timeagostars3.8k - Easy support of automatic updating fuzzy timestamps (e.g. "4 minutes ago").

Back to top

Translations

Internationalization (i18n) and localization (l10n).

  • i18n propertiesstars374 - Lightweight plugin for providing internationalization to JavaScript from .properties files
  • jquery.i18nstars584 - jQuery based Javascript internationalization library for easy internationalization of web application
  • jquery.localize.jsstars470 - Easy internationalization of your static web site

Back to top

Validation

Validation plugins.

  • FormValidationstars2.8k - Form fields validator, designed for Bootstrap, Foundation, Pure, Semantic UI, UIKit and other frameworks.
  • h5Validatestars588 - An HTML5 form validation plugin for jQuery.
  • jQuery Form Validatorstars976 - Validate user input while keeping your HTML markup clean from JavaScript code.
  • jquery-validationstars10.1k - Drop-in validation for your existing forms, while making all kinds of customizations to fit your application really easy.
  • jQuery.validationEnginestars2.6k - Validation of form fields in the browser.
  • jQuery-form-validationstars32 - Validatie html forms using Laravel syntax.

Back to top

Miscellaneous Plugins

Plugins that couldn't be sorted in above categories yet.

  • Boilerplatestars2.6k - A jump-start for jQuery plugins development.
  • Interlink - Event interlink plugin.
  • Sisyphusstars2k - Gmail-like client-side drafts and bit more.
  • Slugifystars86 - Creates a URL slug as you type a page title (like Django slugify()).
  • Readmore.jsstars1.5k - A lightweight jQuery plugin for collapsing and expanding long blocks of text with "Read more" and "Close" links.
  • Yahoo! Emoticons - Yahoo! Emoticons JQuery Plugin.
  • autoNumbericstars1.6k - autoNumeric is a standalone library that provides live as-you-type formatting for international numbers and currencies.

Back to top

Mobile

Mobile section.

  • jQuery mobile - Lightweight framework for building mobile web apps with HTML5.
  • Interdimensionalstars340 - Spatial scrolling on mobile devices for your web pages.
  • OhSnap!.jsstars280 - A simple jQuery/Zepto notification library designed to be used in mobile apps.

Back to top

UI

User Interface section.

  • Dragulastars20.5k - Framework agnostic drag and drop library, supports jQuery integration.
  • jQuery UI - Curated set of user interface interactions, effects, widgets, and themes built on top of the jQuery.
  • jQuery Enhanced Splitterstars28 - Create draggable content splitters to emulate frames and separate content.
  • tabulous.jsstars566 - Tabs for todays web
  • X-editablestars6.5k - In-place editing with Twitter Bootstrap, jQuery UI or pure jQuery.

Back to top

Testing

Unit tests, testing section.

  • Qunit - A JavaScript Unit Testing framework, used by the jQuery, jQuery UI and jQuery mobile projects.
  • Mockjaxstars2.1k - Provides a simple and extremely flexible interface for mocking or simulating ajax requests and responses.

Back to top

Server-side Integrations

Best practices of integrating client-side jQuery with server-side technologies.

  • Node.js:
    • Bower - Useful package manager optimized for the front-end.
    • cheerio - jQuery for server-side manipulations. It makes possible to construct jQuery instance from HTML string then query and manipulate it. Does not implement ajax and effects API.
  • PHP:
    • PHP front end setup without Node - Tutorial how to combine BowerPHP, Mini-Asset and Robo.li into a PHP front end asset building pipeline.
    • symfony-collectionstars436 - jQuery Plugin that manages adding, deleting and moving elements from a Symfony2 collection.
  • Python:
    • django-static-jquery - jQuery packaged in an handy Django app to speed up new applications and deployment.
  • Ruby:
    • jquery-railsstars924 - A gem to automate using jQuery with Rails.
    • jquery-ui-railsstars1.1k - jQuery UI for the Rails asset pipeline.

Back to top

Community

Ask and answer questions, share and get jQuery related stuff and get in touch with the community.

  • Forum - Official forum.
  • Freenode - Support IRC channel for users of jQuery, jQuery UI, and jQuery Mobile.
  • Stack Overflow - Support on Stack Overflow.
  • Facebook - Large and active group on Facebook.
  • Linked.in - Large and active group on Linked.in.
  • Reddit - Discussion and sharing news, articles, plugins and tutorials, covering jQuery Core, jQuery UI, jQuery Mobile, and other related projects.
  • Quora - Ask and answer questions on Quora website.
  • Meetup - Get involved locally.
  • Twitter - Official news and updates from the jQuery team on Twitter.

Back to top

Alternatives

Alternative implementations of jQuery API.

  • cashstars5.1k - small jQuery alternative for modern browsers. Includes all API with deliberate exception for ajax.
  • Zepto - small jQuery alternative, which includes ajax, effects and additional utilities.
  • jBone - jQuery implementation to use with Backbone. Supports only subset of API which is required for Backbone to work. Can be a byte-saver if you don't intend to use jQuery directly, but have Backbone in your project.

Back to top

Looking for more lists like this?

  • Awesome lists:
    • awesomestars165k - Awesome lists
    • awesome-allstars156 - Awesome lists
    • emijrp/awesome-awesomestars1.8k - Awesome lists
    • erichs/awesome-awesomestars224 - Awesome lists
    • GetAwesomeness - Awesome lists
    • listsstars7.3k - Awesome lists
  • awesome-javascriptstars24k - Awesome JavaScript list
  • awesome-javascript-booksstars119 - Awesome JavaScript books
  • js-must-watchstars12.6k - List of must-watch videos devoted to JavaScript
  • Translations:
    • Chinese - Chinese translation of Awesome jQuery.

Back to top

Contributing and License

You are most welcome to contribute to this awesome jQuery list as well. Big thanks to all contributors who have helped to build this list.

To the extent possible under law, Peter Kokot has waived all copyright and related or neighboring rights to this work.

Back to top

awesomeList.descriptionHTML: A curated list of awesome jQuery plugins, resources and other shiny things.
